### useCloneElementRef()

给 child node clone ref

```typescript
useCloneElementRef: <C extends React.ReactNode>({ children, ref, }: {
    children: C;
    ref: NonNullRef<any>;
}, { skipped, domOnly, }?: HookSharedOptions & {
    domOnly?: boolean;
}) => C | React.JSX.Element
```

#### useCloneElementRef的参数


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  参数 | 类型 | 描述 |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  { children, ref, } | { children: C; ref: [NonNullRef](#nonnullref) &lt;any&gt;; } |  |
|  { skipped, domOnly, } | [HookSharedOptions](#hooksharedoptions) &amp; { domOnly?: boolean; } |  |

<b>返回值:</b>

C \| React.JSX.Element
